subject: [PATCH 4/8 RFC] mm/page_counter: introduce stock drain APIs

2026-04-10.patch_summary: This patch introduces two new functions, page_counter_drain_stock() and page_counter_drain_cpu(), to replace the existing memcg stock draining functions. The new functions are designed to handle rare operations such as draining system memory under pressure or when a cgroup is dying. They use work_on_cpu() to synchronously drain each online CPU's stock and synchronize with concurrent charge/uncharge via local_lock. page_counter_drain_cpu() handles the CPU hotplug dead path, where the stock can be accessed directly without locking since the CPU is dead.
